parameters.query:
UPDATE document_chunks 
SET 
  ocr_text = '{{$json.ocrText.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  caption = '{{$json.caption.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  chunk_type = 'image',
  metadata = jsonb_build_object(
    'ocr_engine', 'paddleocr',
    'text_length', {{$json.ocrText.length}},
    'vision_model', '{{$json.visionModel || 'gpt-4-vision-preview'}}'
  )
WHERE document_id = '{{$json.documentId}}'
  AND content LIKE '%{{$('Extract Input').item.json.imageUrl}}%';
